properties.markdown:
# FF Saturday — Public Booking Ops

**Refresh:** 30s · **Lookback:** 1h (most widgets) · **Runbook:** `[[saturday_operational_runbook]]`

Funnel events: `public_booking_event` (backend) + `frontend_funnel_event` (frontend). They thread together via `phone`/`reservationId` (BE) and `sessionId` (FE).

properties.title: Backend funnel by step (1h)
properties.query: SOURCE '/aws/lambda/ff-reservations-api' | filter @message like "public_booking_event" | parse @message /step:\s*'(?<step>[a-z_]+)'/ | stats count() as cnt by step | sort cnt desc

properties.title: Frontend funnel by event (1h)
properties.query: SOURCE '/aws/lambda/ff-reservations-api' | filter @message like "frontend_funnel_event" | parse @message /event:\s*'(?<event>[a-z_]+)'/ | stats count() as cnt by event | sort cnt desc

properties.title: Recent block reasons — what's stopping customers (1h, last 25)
properties.query: SOURCE '/aws/lambda/ff-reservations-api' | fields @timestamp | parse @message /step:\s*'(?<step>blocked_[a-z_]+)'/ | parse @message /phone:\s*'(?<phone>[^']+)'/ | parse @message /eventDate:\s*'(?<eventDate>[^']+)'/ | filter ispresent(step) | sort @timestamp desc | limit 25 | display @timestamp, step, phone, eventDate

properties.title: /r status arrivals — were they paid or cancelled? (1h)
properties.query: SOURCE '/aws/lambda/ff-reservations-api' | filter @message like "frontend_funnel_event" | parse @message /event:\s*'(?<event>r_status_[a-z_]+)'/ | filter ispresent(event) | stats count() as cnt by event

properties.title: Day-shape early warning — webhook ignored (1h)
properties.query: SOURCE '/aws/lambda/ff-reservations-api' | filter @message like "reservation_update_ignored" | sort @timestamp desc | limit 25 | display @timestamp, @message

properties.title: Recent payments recorded (1h, last 25)
properties.query: SOURCE '/aws/lambda/ff-reservations-api' | filter @message like "payment_recorded" | sort @timestamp desc | limit 25 | display @timestamp, @message
